Authors and Citation

Authors

  • Connor Hughes. Author.

  • Paanwaris Paansri. Author.

  • Marlon Cobos. Author.

Citation

Source: DESCRIPTION

Castaneda-Guzman M, Hughes C, Paansri P, Cobos M (2026). nicheR: An R package for ellipsoid-based virtual species and niche visualization in E-space and G-space. R package version 0.0.11, https://github.com/castanedaM/NicheR. 

@Manual{,
  title = {nicheR: An R package for ellipsoid-based virtual species and niche visualization in E-space and G-space},
